acceptance_criteria: Log in with valid credentials from seed data.
Locate the file input with data-testid='avatar-upload'.
Upload a valid PNG image file under 5MB.
Verify success message appears with data-testid='upload-success'.
Verify the avatar image displays immediately after upload with data-testid='user-avatar'.
Refresh the page and verify the avatar persists.
Attempt to upload invalid file type (.exe) and verify error message with data-testid='upload-error'.
Verify avatar is visible in header navigation after upload.
